patterns_recognized: confidence_downgrade=True permanently suspends near-zero CAP-1 rescue: 6/5 BAL@TOR (0.04pp rescue fired despite flag → 13-3 blowout loss) confirmed both CAP-1 and CAP-10 demotions must stand when this flag is True regardless of edge proximity to zero.

f5_full_delta >= 0.17 resolved Stage 2 as authoritative predictor in all 5 applicable 6/5 games — treat as mandatory SKIP disqualifier; today's BOS@NYY (Δ=0.2374) and KC@MIN (Δ=0.2936) are the clearest today instances.

HARD CAP 1 market authority is non-negotiable even with strongest multi-signal stacks: 6/4 TOR@ATL (-4.02pp upgrade to GOLD → 7-2 blowout) established permanent rule against tier-upgrading a CAP-1-demoted pick above its post-cap grade.

Near-zero HARD CAP 7 exception (|gap| < 0.010 treated as neutral) applies only when pre_cap_score >= 4 (A-grade); pre_cap=3 (B+) picks receive standard HARD CAP 7 demotion — today's NYM@SD (gap=+0.0081, pre_cap=3) fires correctly and is not overridden.

SEA @ DET.reasoning: D-grade (-1) with fair_prob unavailable (fetched_capped — no market line to validate edge). SP xERA +2.18 AGAINST DET (Bryce Miller over Montero) and PQI=-28.1 AGAINST both oppose the pick. F3=113.8 is far below the 1000 high-conviction threshold; Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.04) is the sole positive signal. 6/5 SEA@DET postgame confirmed D-grade dual-signal-against is directionally unreliable, not anti-directional. SKIP maintained.

SP edge 1.21 xERA AGAINST KC, PQI +16.2 AGAINST KC. confidence_downgrade=True, bullpen_fatigue flag. fair_prob=0.3082 fails 0.42 threshold. Edge +21.42pp is in calibration_caution_18_25pp zone — inflated artifact. Multiple converging caps correctly SKIP.
